binding_free_energy.honest_disclaimer: Computed under the GAFF-2.11 + ff14SB + TIP3P 'MMP-1 minus zinc' model. The catalytic Zn^{2+} essential for hydroxamate / quinone chelation is NOT modeled. The +0.55 ± 0.38 result is the protocol's verdict for non-zinc EMB-3 binding modes only. Quantitative binding via Zn coordination + Cys278 covalent adduct requires ZAFF + covalent docking (CarsiDock-Cov adapter, Round 5).
